primary_endpoint: ex-vivo EDL specific force (kN/m^2), aged mice, cocktail vs vehicle
multiplicity: Primary: cocktail vs vehicle at alpha=0.05. Secondary family: 2 constituent drop-outs, Holm-adjusted, gated behind a positive primary. Scramble / 1C-MIM / exercise are context arms, also gated.
sex: both sexes; analyzed with sex as a stratification covariate (not separately powered unless a sex interaction is pre-declared)
caveat: SD from published mouse EDL specific-force ranges (Brooks & Faulkner; Lynch et al.); the true SD is confirmed in Stage-1/pilot and the calc re-run before registration.
